creator: rezny@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 179117
add x11-drivers/xf86-video-geode

Multiple times someone has asked in #freebsd-xorg why there is no port of the Geode video driver, so I went ahead and made one. I checked building in poudriere on 10.3 and 11.0 i386 with Xorg server 1.19.0.
